message:
Merge pull request #72 from steipete/dependabot/github_actions/actions/upload-artifact-6

chore(deps): bump actions/upload-artifact from 5 to 6

files.patch:
@@ -43,7 +43,7 @@ jobs:
         fail_ci_if_error: false
         
     - name: Upload coverage artifact
-      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v5
+      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
       with:
         name: coverage-report
         path: coverage/

@@ -46,7 +46,7 @@ jobs:
       run: pnpm pack
       
     - name: Upload CLI artifacts
-      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v5
+      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
       with:
         name: poltergeist-cli
         path: '*.tgz'
@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@ jobs:
         ditto -c -k --keepParent "$APP_PATH" "$ARCHIVE_NAME"
         
     - name: Upload macOS app artifacts
-      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v5
+      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
       with:
         name: poltergeist-macos
         path: |
